title: galium bourgaeanum subsp. bourgaeanum
intro: Galium bourgaeanum subsp. bourgaeanum, also known as Bourgaea rosea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Galium bourgaeanum subsp. bourgaeanum are typically dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to create a topical application for skin conditions.
